meta.name: description
meta.content: Login to your account or Register new one at ResumeCheck.net
Login to your account or Register new one at ResumeCheck.net

meta.name: twitter:description
meta.content: Go to your free account in the platform for ResumeCheck.net

main.class: w-full bg-opacity-60 g-cyan-50 flex flex-col items-center text-base

nav.class: text-base w-screen fixed top-0 w-full bg-background border-b z-40

div.class: flex items-center justify-between max-w-screen-xl mx-auto px-6 py-2
hidden xl:flex flex-row grow-0 items-center gap-4 ml-auto

a.class: font-medium text-black hover:text-accent xl:mx-2 block hover:underline
font-medium text-black hover:text-accent xl:mx-2 block hover:underline
mx-2 text-[15px] font-medium text-black hover:text-accent hover:underline

div.class: w-full flex flex-col items-center relative mt-10 lg:mt-16

svg.class: absolute inset-x-0 top-0 -z-10 h-[40rem] w-full stroke-gray-200 [mask-image:radial-gradient(32rem_32rem_at_center,white,transparent)]

div.class: absolute -top-80 left-[max(6rem,33%)] -z-10 transform-gpu blur-3xl sm:left-1/2 md:top-20 lg:ml-20 xl:top-3 xl:ml-56
aspect-[801/1036] w-[10rem] lg:w-[20rem] xl:w-[22rem] bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#ff80b5] to-[#9089fc] opacity-30
card card--default p-0 overflow-hidden w-full rounded-none md:rounded-xl shadow-sm md:max-w-3xl
flex flex-col col-span-4 justify-center text-center gap-3 p-3 md:p-5

div.div: We'll send you a login link and a one-time password (OTP) code. Either can be used to access your account. If this is your first time, an account will be created for you automatically.

div.class: w-full max-w-screen-sm flex relative items-center gap-5

button.class: flex justify-center items-center bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-500

flex justify-center items-center bg-white border border-gray-300 rounded-lg px-6 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-gray-500

text-white bg-[#050708] hover:bg-[#050708]/90 focus:ring-4 focus:outline-none focus:ring-[#050708]/50 font-medium rounded-lg text-sm px-5 py-2.5 text-center inline-flex justify-center items-center dark:focus:ring-[#050708]/50 dark:hover:bg-[#050708]/30

div.div:
By continuing, you agree with our
Terms of service, Privacy policy and Cookie policy

div.class: col-span-3 bg-gradient-to-br from-accent to-secondary p-5 text-white
grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-8 items-start

div.p: Don't let your resume hold you back from getting your dream job!

img.style: color:transparent;filter:brightness(0.8) saturate(100%) invert(0%) sepia(0%) saturate(0%) hue-rotate(0deg) brightness(0%) contrast(100%)
color:transparent;filter:brightness(0.8) saturate(100%) invert(0%) sepia(0%) saturate(0%) hue-rotate(0deg) brightness(0%) contrast(100%)

li.a: Application terms of service & privacy policy

hr.class: separator separator--horizontal separator--default max-w-lg border-dotted mx-auto

div.div: Powered by JobMojito.com Copyright @2026, All Rights Reserved.
